**Sales Systems Masterclass 👨‍💻🤝💰**

**Goals:** 

* How to get more sales calls booked from paid ads  
* How to increase call quality   
* How to diagnose sales constraints & read your data   
* Part 1 \= How to get more high quality calls showing up   
* Part 2 \= How to close more of those high quality calls

---

***PART 1 \- How To Get High Quality Calls On The Calendar*** 

**It all starts with your paid ads execution / targeting:** 

* Who you direct your marketing towards will dictate who comes through your funnel.   
* Watch Client Getting Paid Ads Mastermind [Pt 1](https://www.skool.com/scalematrix/classroom/a39b26d6?md=6e6941a48fc345a5963ee37e5feac629) & [Part 2](https://www.skool.com/scalematrix/classroom/a39b26d6?md=ae6bfdda991044e8855a3c686c106a29)  
* Write your ad angles and scripts with intention and direct it towards your ideal client avatar (clients with more money)   
* This will effect everything down stream.   
* You can’t fix sales constraints in isolation to poor marketing.   
* You’ll know if marketing is the main constraint based on feedback from discovery calls. You’ll have cheap leads but a high CPSCB due to a lot of disqualifications. 

**Create a positive feedback loop based on sales calls:** 

* Look at the characteristics of the people that are closing.   
* Where are they located?   
* How long have they been in the industry?   
* What was the main reason they said they needed your solution?   
* How much money were they already making?  
* What were their goals? 

\>\>\> All the above insights impact your ads, your copy writing, the questions you screen for in your discovery call script. 

**Speed To Lead:** 

* The odds of contacting a lead drops off 10X if you follow up more than 5 mins after they convert on average.   
* Extrapolate this out… the longer it takes to reach a lead \> the worse your conversion rate is.   
* If you improve your lead to booked call CRV by 3-5% this can have massive impact down stream.   
* Eg current lead to call CRV \= 13% \> lift to 18%   
* You get 200 leads per month \> 26 calls VS 36 calls \> 10 extra calls \> 2-3 extra clients.   
* This can mean an extra $5K \- $8k/m added per month. Even at small scale that can be add to up to over 6 figures a year in extra rev.    
* Leads are by default higher quality if you reach them sooner as intent is higher closer to when they decided to respond to the ad. This makes them easier to close by the time they show up for a call.  
* You’d rather call a new lead 7 times than 7 old leads.  

![][image1]

**How Do We Solve For Speed To Lead?** 

***\#1 Get an appt setter ASAP***

* Appt setting high income producing activity BUT it requires a low level of skill.   
* This is an arbitrage opportunity. Low skill \> high output / cash return.   
* You are a busy founder wearing 6 hats.   
* You don’t have the bandwidth to follow up with leads at the drop of a hat and do the volume of follow up required to manage the pipeline correctly.  
* It’s the appt setters job to solve for speed to lead.   
* Track average lead response time as a weekly average. Shoot for within 15 mins. 

Where & When To Hire An Appt Setter \>\>\> [HERE](https://www.skool.com/scalematrix/classroom/2bfa1cb7?md=194ba7c372024c0b8670b539c956a9e2)

Full Daily Workflow & In Depth SOP’s \>\>\> [HERE](https://www.skool.com/scalematrix/classroom/2bfa1cb7?md=736d98054c134faea48934f3424c17aa)   

![][image2]

![][image3]

---

**Increasing Call Quality & Intent After They’ve Booked:** 

*This goes hand in hand with increasing your show up rate. Quality calls are with people that want to be there. People that want to be there show up…* 

**Strategy \#1:** Don’t book meetings more than 5 days out from the current day. Always default to booking as soon as possible. Even same day if possible. 

**Strategy \#2:** Have Basic confirmations setup. SMS & Email immediately after booking \+ reminder 24hrs & 1hr before meetings with CTA to sms & confirm. 

Example calendly [appt confirmation workflow](https://help.calendly.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500005846741-How-to-reconfirm-meetings-with-Workflows#01J5P82M6HZ5SPJ7Q1MV6NC0KZ) 

**Strategy \# 3:** Don’t just have a “thank you page video” after a call is booked. Send them to a breakout video \+ organic asset (Yt channel, IG page, Skool / FB Group) \> These are living breathing marketing assets that bolster trust and authority. 

**Breakout video should include:** 

* Answer FAQ you are sick of answering on sales calls   
* Pre handle objections you are sick of handling on sales calls   
* Breakdown best social proof   
* Do a quick pre demo “show don’t tell” 

Include the breakout video in all CTA’s in post booking texts & emails

![][image4]

[Good training on how to increase show up rate that touches on breakout videos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z5LG8QtpBTs&t=321s)

**Strategy \#4 Post Booking Email Nurturing Sequence**

* When people initially decide to book in a call are in "scanning mode” \> passively looking for an opportunity.   
* When people are deciding to show up for a call they are in justification made. Life gets in the way, people change their mind, they forget why booked in the first place.   
* Have a 4-5 day email sequence with with 2 emails a day all on topics selling them on why they should show up to the call.   
* Email topics include, pre handling objections, busting common myths, answering FAQ’s, [breaking down case studies.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11pZFspSJbQjC_8bdE2LsCQw4MuD_9NpSUhUY-1OjyCc/edit?usp=sharing) 

**High Level Stats For Appt Setting:** 

* 15% lead to sales call booked CRV   
* 70-80% show up rate   
* 90-95% offer rate 

**Strategy \#5 Address PMF With Current Core Offer** 

* If you have a really bad closing rate but your sales execution is good.   
* You might be trying to put a round object in a square hole.   
* Is your offer commoditised / outdated?   
* Do you have a unique mechanism that addresses current market sentiment?   
* Do you have a risk reversal?   
* Is your pricing correct?   
* I added a downsell offer & my closing rate when from 25% \> 40% last october. 

**Strategy \#6 Follow The Script**

* Don’t get blase and lazy with your sales calls.   
* Have discipline and maintain the structure of a clear script.   
* Ask the same question in the same order every call.  
* Don’t let clients go off on tangents.   
* 90% of training and ramping up a new closer is getting to just actually follow the script. 

Script Example 1 \>\>\> [More Niche Tailored](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1iZJDW3HhVJVDg2HualfRFpaYCtRurPw73aPGzxL2RI0/edit?usp=sharing) 

Script Example 2 \>\>\> [Broader CLOSER framework](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1utjk-Rh1T0K0RJw8EaUreqWPwjJoubVB0AXdnP6Tf8w/edit?usp=sharing) 

Script Example 3 \>\>\> [Templated version of Example 1](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PCB-AdvEz6wXOw4bWeqOVALyQYelcDZN3JLt0AA0M5Q/edit?usp=sharing) 

Hormozi Objection Handles: [HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1EcFzLnPyoHumdbssucJ1Qr3WqKndTOpkWxLe8p_uxTA/edit?usp=sharing)

Fortune is in the follow up training: [HERE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l8KpVMFugRY)

**My Favourite Books On Sales:** 

* [Influence](https://www.amazon.com.au/influence-Psychology-Robert-PhD-Cialdini/dp/006124189X/ref=sr_1_2?crid=2TWYAUDOTV7R4&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.9Mb6GKvj1FUBNBM5-AHEv_jzYkThncJ_Iw96OdKC5r9ohI-CojCt-AOgLP6XQHi8GE_0P9L-YqefGl3rsN8UxK57aoqqHNezR10qFQ_khR0STPjJi8As-511LhPT0Ns5DtDdbwpNkPDOWZOQUn1Rd3Gx6j1Wx_wiqpivFzsyPZTPxRD63WZQg9VY48RpuwuAIhKxzb-pCzxwdWKXDs1r0ZiSpvtHuqnpuRfw_qZi3Qg.J4aZVSxq7XPeNSqQfuj_C9Tyq72AgujDDgQ47WvFhVs&dib_tag=se&keywords=influence+by+robert+b+cialdini&qid=1764279934&s=books&sprefix=influence+by+rob%2Cstripbooks%2C227&sr=1-2)  
* [Persuasion](https://www.amazon.com.au/Pre-Suasion-Revolutionary-Way-Influence-Persuade/dp/1847941435/ref=sr_1_1?crid=1P0NY308YHEFW&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.2A9q8j8BaiRB7F3myPGPwHPFN99qZ3VTVkpLkno_EkA0dFr8MtqeU6F3XjhtshxQOdQeXwJGIZe02Zqnkv2KMTIKlkhy6nl7OQVYoaAqntGiFz-pJwnLLr96g-U_4awEPSdIDQc7y4AXo12jY_ZjgWrfEwXTBD8--VJngiRle8BzjZ_Hojw9Ia2jpt88N9HeWdtB5g7RmyEwLm0wjQgmQ9ukqtlofwc4MLH0GAHlCMeh_3MPuT53MshEqt3oTgCJ2Wo4uJKW22DwV2XyADETBilJp2i1JIwlvDT71XgNp9M.3AAEQC7QhJBJls-HA9pS1xZlatCG6OsFyW4pCHVi-CM&dib_tag=se&keywords=pre+suasion&qid=1764279966&sprefix=pre+sua%2Caps%2C212&sr=8-1)   
* [50 Scientifically Proven Ways to Be Persuasive](https://www.amazon.com.au/Yes-Scientifically-Proven-Ways-Persuasive/dp/1416570969/ref=sr_1_1?crid=2YT7M5ZPFR1QQ&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.h7F2m3iqwu5umrfH9Af9ak_iIS8gTJr9De8nx0bRitx6Mb8uZD9vYhy0_R9jZ3o3llYvVPCfm3DupwEXxS3S_YYxo2tmvLMJyEJBew2-G3VL284fYWorGnQmIuYziozLNnQ8Mw4boWjI_QZe8ZafTCth4x8-xWayi4YSFw45SKEGGyeWcHjuL_UEtbl7UJnQ.8ePh-B4Ag2OedDx4ReGAsZzCLgybQ4TrB2dIBXbodQE&dib_tag=se&keywords=50+scientifically+proven+ways&qid=1764279997&sprefix=50+scien%2Caps%2C222&sr=8-1) 

**Strategy \#7 \- The 3 Pillars Framework**

* Pitch based on outcomes & solution to problems not deliverables   
* Tie in client stories to each pillar. 

 [**The 3 Pillars Framework Template**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1SzICdtiILbHk9ycgvWTHD2sYtHYgSFF8UjrYdjr6uHg/edit?tab=t.0) 

**Strategy \#8 \- Manufacture Conviction** 

* Conviction is the biggest variables that creates persuasiveness   
* Bitcoin time travel example.   
* Keep a bank of proof. I have mine in a slack channel & a google drive folder.   
* To get yourself out of a sales rut, read through your social proof, watch ur testimonials and listing back to successful calls so you can see yourself doing it and collecting cash. 

**Strategy \#9 \- RECORD YOUR DAMN CALLS** 

* If your calls aren’t recorded you’ve no qualitative data to optimise and improve.   
* Listen back to your calls, a lot of the time we don’t need a coach to pick us up on our mistakes. Its obvious when you watch your calls back.   
* Most people are just lazy and it takes paying a coach to actually prioritise doing this.  
* I use native loom integration so calls are auto recorded and transcript is auto generated.   
* Can plug transcripts into [custom GPT](https://chatgpt.com/share/69283979-def8-8012-896f-a0ef0b85fe60) for call review breakdown and to get it to coach you. Use "extended thinking mode” on initial prompt.  

**Strategy \#10 \- Ask questions in your script that create logical inconsistencies** 

“Assuming you like the system and you can see it would help you get to $500K/yr in GCI is $2K/m an investment you’d be willing and able to work with right now” 

“Is this a sooner or later thing for you right now, when would you be wanting to ramp up listing acquisition?”

“Whats the main reason you decided to book in the call in the first place”   
\>\>\> Get real reason   
\>\>\> Why now though?
